title: OCF2 Proof-of-Liabilities Field Registry
description: Canonical field definitions reused by Proof-of-Liabilities profiles.

userId.description: Unique identifier for a user account.

balance.description: Balance amount, encoded as decimal string.

totalLiabilityAmount.description: Total liability quantity for an asset, encoded as decimal string.

merkleRoot.description: Merkle root (hex) committing to the full set of user liabilities.

liabilityType.description: Category of liability (e.g., user-balance, earned-rewards, lending-obligation, insurance-reserve).
